'''mofazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coaeval|coaeval]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coaeval|coaeval]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mofazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofazhithi|mofazhithi]] || [[word:mofazhiji|mofazhiji]] || [[word:mofazhishi|mofazhishi]] || [[word:mofazhiki|mofazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofazhuthuthu|mofazhuthuthu]] || [[word:mofazhujuju|mofazhujuju]] || [[word:mofazhushushu|mofazhushushu]] || [[word:mofazhukuku|mofazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofazhuthu|mofazhuthu]] || [[word:mofazhuju|mofazhuju]] || [[word:mofazhushu|mofazhushu]] || [[word:mofazhuku|mofazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofazhufthuf|mofazhufthuf]] || [[word:mofazhufjuf|mofazhufjuf]] || [[word:mofazhufshuf|mofazhufshuf]] || [[word:mofazhufkuf|mofazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofazhethe|mofazhethe]] || [[word:mofazheje|mofazheje]] || [[word:mofazheshe|mofazheshe]] || [[word:mofazheke|mofazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofazhothotho|mofazhothotho]] || [[word:mofazhojojo|mofazhojojo]] || [[word:mofazhoshosho|mofazhoshosho]] || [[word:mofazhokoko|mofazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofazhotho|mofazhotho]] || [[word:mofazhojo|mofazhojo]] || [[word:mofazhosho|mofazhosho]] || [[word:mofazhoko|mofazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofazhofthof|mofazhofthof]] || [[word:mofazhofjof|mofazhofjof]] || [[word:mofazhofshof|mofazhofshof]] || [[word:mofazhofkof|mofazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofazhïfthïf|mofazhïfthïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfjïf|mofazhïfjïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfshïf|mofazhïfshïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfkïf|mofazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofazhïfthïfthïf|mofazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfjïfjïf|mofazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfshïfshïf|mofazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfkïfkïf|mofazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofazhïfthïf|mofazhïfthïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfjïf|mofazhïfjïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfshïf|mofazhïfshïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfkïf|mofazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofazhïfthïf|mofazhïfthïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfjïf|mofazhïfjïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfshïf|mofazhïfshïf]] || [[word:mofazhïfkïf|mofazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofazhæthæ|mofazhæthæ]] || [[word:mofazhæjæ|mofazhæjæ]] || [[word:mofazhæshæ|mofazhæshæ]] || [[word:mofazhækæ|mofazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofazhathatha|mofazhathatha]] || [[word:mofazhajaja|mofazhajaja]] || [[word:mofazhashasha|mofazhashasha]] || [[word:mofazhakaka|mofazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofazhatha|mofazhatha]] || [[word:mofazhaja|mofazhaja]] || [[word:mofazhasha|mofazhasha]] || [[word:mofazhaka|mofazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofazhafthaf|mofazhafthaf]] || [[word:mofazhafjaf|mofazhafjaf]] || [[word:mofazhafshaf|mofazhafshaf]] || [[word:mofazhafkaf|mofazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mofazhasha|mofazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofazhshësha|mofazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofazhrosha|mofazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofazhmusha|mofazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofazhyasha|mofazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofazhnkshësha|gomofazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofazhnkrosha|gomofazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofazhnkmusha|gomofazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofazhnkyasha|gomofazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mofafazhasha|mofafazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofafazhshësha|mofafazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofafazhrosha|mofafazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofafazhmusha|mofafazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofafazhyasha|mofafazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofafazhnkshësha|gomofafazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofafazhnkrosha|gomofafazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofafazhnkmusha|gomofafazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofafazhnkyasha|gomofafazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mefæzhasha|mefæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mefæzhshësha|mefæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mefæzhrosha|mefæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mefæzhmusha|mefæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mefæzhyasha|mefæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomefæzhnkshësha|gomefæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomefæzhnkrosha|gomefæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomefæzhnkmusha|gomefæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomefæzhnkyasha|gomefæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mofazhasha|mofazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofazhshësha|mofazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofazhrosha|mofazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofazhmusha|mofazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofazhyasha|mofazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofazhnkshësha|gomofazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofazhnkrosha|gomofazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofazhnkmusha|gomofazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofazhnkyasha|gomofazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
